name: OSHKOSH CORP
business: Oshkosh Corporation designs and deploys advanced technologies to create purpose-built vehicles, equipment and integrated ecosystems for construction, firefighting, aviation, refuse collection, defense and delivery industries. The company has three reportable segments: Access, Vocational, and Transport, which comprised 43%, 36% and 20% of 2025 consolidated net sales, respectively. Sales to the U.S. government represented approximately 20% of net sales in 2025.
sellsTo: commercial airlines, airports, air freight carriers
mining, construction, and equipment rental companies
international militaries (NATO and other U.S.-approved partner nations)

exposures.sentence: the Company is demonstrating how the FMAV platforms directly support modernization priorities for long-range precision fires, resilient formations and scalable autonomy to deliver production-based solutions that reduce risk and increase capabilities for soldiers in contested environments.

The Company leverages disruptive technologies including autonomy, artificial intelligence, connectivity and electrification to unlock step-change improvements in safety, productivity, sustainability and the total cost of ownership.
the JLG ClearSky Smart Fleet connected technology, a two-way digital ecosystem delivering real-time intelligence
the McNeilus Volterra ZSL and ZFL, North America’s first fully integrated electric refuse and recycling collection vehicles
Oshkosh Defense has designed and sold products to the DoD for over 100 years

the JLG AG619 agriculture telehandler, engineered to help farmers maneuver and lift with ease in tight spaces

catalysts.event: Quarterly dividend increase to $0.57 per share beginning in first quarter of 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Company announced an increase in its quarterly dividend rate of 11.8%, to $0.57 per share, beginning in the first quarter of 2026.
